checkpoint: Voynich OS v12.3 - Output Manifest and Alias Layer
purpose: Inventory, hash, classify, and route generated artifact families before any professional folder migration.

claim_boundary.safe_claim: Voynich OS can inventory, hash, route, and audit generated symbolic-analysis artifacts from the Voynich transcription corpus.
locks: Generated outputs are task-bounded artifacts, not universal proof.

aliases.reason: Source corpus path is active and should remain stable until package-level migration is planned.
aliases.claim_boundary: Corpus presence is not translation or decipherment.

aliases.reason: Generated folio JSON artifacts must be manifested before any folder migration.
aliases.claim_boundary: Folio graph outputs are diagnostics, not proof of manuscript meaning.

aliases.reason: Meaning/vector outputs are structurally important but semantically bounded.
aliases.claim_boundary: Meaning vectors are diagnostics, not validated semantic readings.

aliases.reason: Manuscript-level synthesis state requires stable provenance.
aliases.claim_boundary: Manuscript state is synthesis output, not proof of decipherment.

aliases.reason: Ledger path is active; future move requires backward-compatible route update.
aliases.claim_boundary: Ledger continuity records process history, not correctness proof.

aliases.reason: Legacy export surface should not be moved until route aliases and references are audited.
aliases.claim_boundary: Legacy output preservation is reproducibility support, not validation.

aliases.reason: Legacy import surface should not be moved until route aliases and references are audited.
aliases.claim_boundary: Legacy input preservation is reproducibility support, not validation.

families.title: Corpus text files
families.claim_boundary: Corpus files are source material for modeling; they are not decipherment.

families.title: Corpus JSON files
families.role: Structured corpus-side source or metadata surface.
families.claim_boundary: Corpus JSON is source/metadata structure, not semantic proof.

families.title: Folio output JSON files
families.claim_boundary: Folio outputs are symbolic diagnostics, not translation.

families.title: Meaning/vector JSON files
families.claim_boundary: Meaning vectors and clusters are diagnostics, not literal meanings.

families.title: Manuscript-level state JSON files
families.claim_boundary: Manuscript-level state is synthesis output, not proof of authorial intent.

families.title: Ledger JSONL files
families.claim_boundary: Ledgers record process history, not correctness proof.

families.title: State audit JSON files
families.claim_boundary: Audit state records observed repo properties, not manuscript interpretation.

families.title: RCC Nexus reports
families.role: RCC-N route and mini README validation reports.
families.claim_boundary: RCC-N validates navigation, not code correctness or decipherment.

families.title: README audit reports
families.role: README and mini repo discipline reports.
families.claim_boundary: README audits validate public framing, not manuscript meaning.

families.title: Documentation Markdown files
families.role: Claim boundary, reproducibility, AI context, archive, and documentation surfaces.
families.claim_boundary: Documentation guides interpretation; it is not evidence by itself.

next_layer.recommended: Voynich OS v12.4 - Showcase Evidence Package and Visual Atlas
next_layer.reason: After outputs are manifested, the repo can package selected evidence surfaces for public demonstration without changing claim strength.
